It's very clean and the service is perfect. Because of the staff, there are sometimes long queues.

reviews.comment:
Lastima que ls cafetería y el kiosco cierran temprano no están las 24hs para los que trabajamos poder ir. Saludos

It's a shame the cafeteria and kiosk close early; they're not open 24 hours for those of us who work. Regards.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoN3BUM05BEAE

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio bastante amplia y grande con varios servicios además de solamente cargar nafta.
Un punto extra es el servishop para tomar un café o demás. El tema es que si necesitas almorzar o cenar algo, los menúes que ofrecen son muy buenos y a un precio muy competitivo más estando en una zona bastante cara para comer.
La atención de los playeros es buena.

(Translated by Google)
This is a fairly large and spacious gas station with several services beyond just refueling.
An added bonus is the convenience store where you can grab a coffee or something else. The best part is that if you need lunch or dinner, the menus they offer are very good and competitively priced, especially considering it's in an area that's quite expensive for dining out. The attendants are friendly and helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURodXJ1V0RBEAE

reviews.comment:
No entiendo por qué tienen cerrada la cafetería a las 21 hs porque después de hacer un alto en el camino, para cargar nafta y seguir viaje, no se puede tomar un cafecito en ese horario

(Translated by Google)
I don't understand why they have the cafeteria closed at 9 p.m. because after making a stop along the way, to fill up with gas and continue the trip, you can't have a coffee at that time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURodXAzNGlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nunca en muchos años que voy tuve tan mala atención de un playero como hace un par de semanas por la noche con alguien que se identificó como Juan Pedro. Dejé queja escrita con los detalles y prometieron llamarme. Nunca ocurrió. Una pena que el ACA no preste atención al trato a sus socios

(Translated by Google)
Never in all the years I've been going to these stations have I received such terrible service from a gas station attendant as I did a couple of weeks ago at night from someone who identified himself as Juan Pedro. I filed a written complaint with the details and they promised to call me back. They never did. It's a shame the ACA doesn't pay attention to how they treat their members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNTNi1lU2p3RRAB
